CustomField.description: DML Rows usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsDmlRowsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c / LimitsDmlRowsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.DmlRows.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c / LimitsDmlRowsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.DmlRows.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c / LimitsDmlRowsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsDmlRowsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DML Rows usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: DML Rows
